notes: Strict identity-preserving edit prompts for Nano Banana. Use one student image input.
shared_constraints: Edit-only mode. Output must be a zoomed-out full-body portrait: full body should appear from head to shoes so the entire uniform is visible. Change ONLY clothing and background to match the selected job. The outfit must be the full realistic uniform/professional clothing of the selected job, complete and context-accurate. The background must be job-related, visually impressive, clear, and richly detailed, with realistic depth and perspective. Keep the image photorealistic with believable lighting, shadows, skin texture, and fabric details. Face handling: do not paste/copy the face. Preserve the same student identity while naturally integrating it into the new scene. Keep the same core identity: eyes, nose, mouth, jawline, facial proportions, skin tone, hairline, hairstyle, and age range (8-12). Allow subtle harmonization so the face fits the scene: adjust lighting direction, color temperature, contrast, and perspective slightly to match the body and background. Keep expression close to input. No beauty retouching, no plastic skin, no makeup look, no exaggerated smoothing. No text, no logos, no readable badge text, no watermark, no cartoon/anime style, no extra people, no face distortion.

prompts.doctor: Transform this child into a doctor role while keeping the same student face with the needed natural modifications to fit the new photo lighting, perspective, and scene. Use the full professional outfit of the job: a clean white lab coat over a light shirt and add a stethoscope. Background: premium pediatric clinic interior, clear and visually rich with modern medical details, realistic depth, and balanced cinematic lighting.
